steps.title: Use release order as the goal
steps.content: The student's goal is not just to mention both films or compare Nora Desai's roles. It is specifically to emphasize the order in which the films were released. The relevant notes place The Three Passions in 1928 early in her career and Forever and a Day in 1943 later in her career.

steps.title: Choose the temporal emphasis
steps.content: Choice A - The Three Passions (1928) was released early in Nora Desai's career, whereas Forever and a Day (1943) came out years later foregrounds the sequence between the two release years. Choice B - Nora Desai was famous for her roles in films like The Three Passions (1928) and Forever and a Day (1943) emphasizes fame rather than order. Choice C - Early in her career, Nora Desai wasn't listed in some film credits mentions only one film. Choice D - In The Three Passions (1928), actress Nora Desai played a nameless, uncredited role; however, in Forever and a Day (1943), she played a credited role - that of Marjorie Ismay stresses credit status instead of release sequence. The answer is A.
